name.description: Short human-readable name for a NEW worktree, e.g. "fix-login-flow" or "desktop-cwd-isolation". Used to derive the worktree directory and default branch name. Required unless `path` is provided.

path.description: Path to an EXISTING worktree under .letta/worktrees/ to switch this conversation into, instead of creating one. Mutually exclusive with `name`, `branch_name`, and `base_ref`. The path must be a registered, non-prunable linked worktree of this repository.

branch_name.description: Optional git branch name to create (new worktrees only). If omitted, a unique branch name like letta/<name>-<suffix> is generated.

base_ref.description: Optional git ref to base a new worktree on. Defaults to the latest remote default branch, usually origin/main.

repo_path.description: Optional path to the git repository to operate on. Use this when the current conversation cwd is not inside the target repo.

refresh_base.description: Whether to fetch the remote base branch before creating the worktree. Defaults to true. (New worktrees only.)

switch_cwd.description: Whether to switch this conversation's working directory to the worktree after create/enter. Defaults to true.
